creator: starikov@caotus.ru
text:
/usr/ports/net/pcnfsd/Makefile
..
MASTER_SITES=   http://www.tux.org/pub/net/lprng/TOOLS/PCNFSD/ \
                http://lprng.sourceforge.net/DISTRIB/TOOLS/PCNFSD/ \
                http://public.planetmirror.com/pub/lprng/UNIXTOOLS/PCNFSD/
..

Only first one is alive and contains required sources.

Fix: 

1. Remove outdated source files from Makefile.
2. Point a question about additional distfiles mirroring for this application.
How-To-Repeat: Copy urls into browser adress string and see displayed pages.
